subject: Human Resources
title: Talent Acquisition
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Talent Acquisition.

hook.text: A single bad hire can cost a company 30% of that employee's annual salary. Getting hiring right matters.

buildup.text: Talent acquisition covers everything from writing job descriptions to sourcing, interviewing, and making offers.

discovery.text: Modern recruitment goes beyond job boards—it includes employer branding, referrals, and talent pipelines.

twist.text: The best candidates aren't usually job hunting. Proactive outreach finds talent that job postings miss.

climax.text: Strategic talent acquisition aligns hiring with long-term business goals, not just filling empty seats.

punchline.text: Hiring isn't filling seats. It's building the future.

quiz.question: What makes talent acquisition strategic?
options: Aligning hiring with long-term business goals
Filling positions as fast as possible
